description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a combination of flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a mix of materials including wood paneling and concrete or stone walls. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with a prominent wooden section and a large, flat-roofed garage or outbuilding. A walled courtyard area with greenery and trees is integrated into the layout, providing a private outdoor space. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large glass panels on some facades and smaller openings on others. The entryway is set back and partially enclosed by a stone wall, offering privacy and a sheltered approach. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern house with flat and sloped roofs, wood and stone exterior, asymmetrical windows, and a walled courtyard with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden facade, and walled courtyard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone wall, flat-roofed garage, and the integration of greenery within the courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the garage, the courtyard wall, and the upper story with visible room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house volume, stone wall, and the courtyard with trees and open space.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat overhang, partially enclosed by a stone wall, and minimalistic door design
